payload.text:
Task MP-021 is complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Files created:**
- `miniprogram/pages/my/favorites/index.js` — unified favorites page with 5 category tabs, batch select/delete, navigation
- `miniprogram/pages/my/favorites/index.wxml` — tab bar, item list, empty states, batch delete bar
- `miniprogram/pages/my/favorites/index.wxss` — styles with senior mode overrides
- `miniprogram/pages/my/favorites/index.json` — page config
- `miniprogram/tests/favorites.test.js` — 19 tests covering all functionality

**Files modified:**
- `pages/activity/detail/index.js|wxml|wxss` — added bookmark toggle with `activity_bookmarks` storage
- `pages/channel/detail/index.js` — mirrors API favorite to local `merchant_bookmarks`
- `pages/govguide/detail/index.js` — expanded bookmark storage to cache metadata
- `pages/enterprise/benefit-detail/index.js` — expanded bookmark storage to cache metadata
- `pages/secondhand/detail/index.js` — migrated array format to object format with metadata
- `pages/my/index.wxml` — added "我的收藏" menu entry
- `miniprogram/app.json` — registered favorites page
- `AGENTS.md` — added MP-021 documentation section

**Test results:** 41 suites, 921 tests passed (including 19 new favorites tests).
